title: Pay Off The Mortgage
description:
Have you always wanted to know the peace of what it feels like to pay off a mortgage?

Well, you won’t find that peace here. Instead, you’ll experience the soul-crushing efforts of the bank trying to ruin any positivity you can muster.

...Okay, maybe you will eventually find out what it feels like to pay off a mortgage.

Gameplay

Pay Off The Mortgage is a casual idle clicker. Click to work, get promoted occassionally, and buy enough coffee to make an eye or two twitch. If you do these things, you might be able to fend off the mortgage's relentless taunts. 

Otherwise, you can at least enjoy the music.

Features:

Simple Clicker Gameplay

Promotions

Coffee

Greg on a Roomba

Passive Income

Coffee

No, not a mistake, just a lot of coffee.

About Pay Off The Mortgage:

No chosen heroes.

No saving the universe.

Just you, your house, lots of clicking, and a bank that refuses to leave you alone.

A stressful journey about achieving the impossible dream:

Actually paying off the mortgage.
description_short: Pay Off The Mortgage is a cozy clicker where every dollar matters. Work, get promoted, survive the bank’s endless taunts and hunger for your money, and chase the impossible dream of owning your home. But whatever happens… Please take care of Greg, he keeps the house warm.
